commit.message:
feat: control plane redesign + UsageMetadata telemetry + documentation overhaul (#1)

* docs: control plane redesign plan — from railroad to guardrails

Comprehensive 8-phase implementation plan addressing the fundamental
tension between model-led conversation intelligence and developer-led
control planes. Covers: context horizon tracking, generationComplete
distinction, proactive silence awareness, context injection steering,
tool availability signaling, conversation repair protocol, session
persistence, and affective signal proxy extraction.

~1060 new lines, 3 new files, 1 minor breaking change.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0184ev3Ms76c8647FnVp9s2C

* feat: add extraction triggers, phase navigation context, transition descriptions, devtools improvements

- ExtractionTrigger enum (EveryTurn, Interval, AfterToolCall, OnPhaseChange)
- PhaseMachine::describe_navigation() for model geolocation awareness
- Transition.description for human-readable transition labels
- Processor trigger-aware filtering and navigation context injection
- Fluent API: extract_turns_triggered(), .navigation(), .transition_with()
- Accumulative merge: null extraction values no longer overwrite state
- Default min_words(3) on windowed extractors
- Devtools: tool result display, audio/telemetry/VAD event filter bar
- Updated all 6 cookbook apps with new features

* feat: implement control plane redesign with async tool calling support

Implements the control plane redesign (phases 0, 2-7) across all three layers:

L0 (rs-genai):
- Surface GenerationComplete as distinct SessionEvent (fires before TurnComplete)
- Add SessionResumeUpdate(ResumeInfo) with handle, resumable, last_consumed_index
- Add Usage(UsageInfo) event for token usage tracking
- Add FunctionResponseScheduling enum (Interrupt, WhenIdle, Silent)
- Add per-tool behavior field on FunctionDeclaration (NonBlocking support)
- Add scheduling field on FunctionResponse for async result delivery

L1 (rs-adk):
- New SoftTurnDetector for proactive silence awareness
- New SteeringMode (InstructionUpdate, ContextInjection, Hybrid)
- New NeedsFulfillment conversation repair protocol with nudge/escalation
- New SessionPersistence trait with FsPersistence and MemoryPersistence backends
- New ExtractionTrigger::OnGenerationComplete for pre-truncation extraction
- ControlPlaneConfig consolidates all control plane settings
- Tool advisory signaling on phase transitions
- State::to_hashmap()/from_hashmap() for persistence serialization
- ToolExecutionMode::Background now carries scheduling mode
- Builder wires NonBlocking behavior to FunctionDeclaration at connect time

L2 (adk-rs-fluent):
- New Live::builder() methods: soft_turn_timeout, steering_mode, repair,
  persistence, session_id, tool_advisory, tool_background_with_scheduling
- All new types exported via prelude

All 1307 tests pass. Documentation updated.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0184ev3Ms76c8647FnVp9s2C

* chore: remove dead code (PhaseTimeline, history_mut)

Delete speculative PhaseTimelineEntry/PhaseTimeline variant and unused
history_mut() method. Zero warnings across the workspace.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0184ev3Ms76c8647FnVp9s2C

* chore: add CI, devcontainer, IDE rules, badges, and prerequisites docs

- Add CI workflow (check, test, clippy, fmt) in .github/workflows/ci.yml
- Add .devcontainer/devcontainer.json for Codespaces/devcontainer support
- Add .cursor/rules/gemini-rs.mdc for Cursor AI editor
- Add .windsurfrules for Windsurf AI editor
- Add .editorconfig for consistent formatting
- Add CI and Docs badges to README
- Add detailed prerequisites section (Ubuntu/macOS setup, env vars)
- Fix dead code: history_mut gated to #[cfg(test)], PhaseTimeline removed
- Fix FunctionResponse in README to include scheduling field

https://claude.ai/code/session_0184ev3Ms76c8647FnVp9s2C

* feat: implement full UsageMetadata telemetry pipeline across L0/L1/L2

L0: Expand UsageMetadata to full 10-field API spec (prompt, response,
cached, tool-use, thoughts token counts + per-modality breakdowns via
ModalityTokenCount). Remove duplicate UsageInfo struct, emit
SessionEvent::Usage from connection.rs on every server content message.

L1: Track all 5 scalar token counts in SessionSignals (session: state
keys) and SessionTelemetry (atomic counters). Wire Usage event dispatch
in telemetry lane processor. Add on_usage callback field to
EventCallbacks.

L2: Add .on_usage() fluent builder method to Live for observing token
usage in real-time.

* docs: update README and user guide with new features

- README: add Core Concepts section with ASCII interplay diagrams,
  document extraction triggers, phase navigation context, background
  tools, UsageMetadata telemetry, callback modes, updated cookbook apps
- extraction.md: add ExtractionTrigger section (EveryTurn, Interval,
  AfterToolCall, OnPhaseChange) with examples
- phases.md: add transition_with() descriptions, .needs() metadata,
  .navigation() phase context, with examples
- live-sessions.md: add .on_usage() callback documentation
- state.md: add token usage session state keys (total, prompt, response,
  cached, thoughts)
- architecture.md: document UsageMetadata handling in telemetry lane
- phase-transitions-deep-dive.md: update pipeline to show extraction
  trigger filtering, navigation context regeneration, OnPhaseChange
  extractors

* docs: console UI redesign plan — OTel-native trace explorer

Unified timeline with canvas minimap, virtual list rendering,
token/usage metrics, OTel span bridging, and SessionBridge to
eliminate cookbook app boilerplate.

---------

Threat model: Add "Privacy Leakage Channels" section with 7 formally analyzed
channels (3 HIGH: graph structure 90%, revocation cascades 80%, ZK metadata 70%;
4 MEDIUM in collapsible). Honest framing: complete prevention impossible, goal
is cost > value of inference.

How it works: Add composition insight — "3 emergent properties exist only in
composition" from correlated equilibrium analysis. ATP×T3×CI interaction produces
self-correcting pricing, unfakeable consistency, and natural quality selection.

Source: web4 sessions 28-29, correlated_equilibrium_mechanism_design.py and
privacy_utility_pareto.py (~175 formal checks).

commit.message:
Fix auto-warp stealing control, brighten minimap, enlarge planet dots

Auto-warp bug: _deepSkyLingerTimer (15s countdown at deep sky objects)
was never cancelled by user input — it would fire beginWarpTurn()
even while the user was actively orbiting/zooming. Fixed by cancelling
the timer on mousemove, mousedown, wheel, and keyboard input when
autopilot is off. Also added wheel event to idle timer reset.

Minimap: removed dark backdrop entirely (was dimming the whole HUD
area). Enlarged planet dots from 2.5-4% to 4-6% of map extent for
better visibility and clickability. Increased pick radius from 6% to
8%. Updated focus ring size to match.

commit.message:
Fix pcl-6nb: readResponse buffer over-read via unchecked msg->length (#354)

* Fix pcl-6nb.1: readResponse buffer over-read in rpcclient.cpp

Replace malloc'd receive buffer with stack array, fix the broken
validation (msg->length compared against POVERLAY_BUFSIZE rather
than max_value_size which excluded the header), fix the payload-read
loop target (msg->length already includes the header, so the old
`header_size + msg->length` limit over-read), add the missing
`msg->length > total_read` guard before memcpy, and add EINTR
handling in the read loop. Eliminates heap over-read when the daemon
sends msg->length > POVERLAY_BUFSIZE.

Ref GH #184.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add readResponse validation tests (pcl-6nb)

Six socketpair-based test cases covering oversized msg->length,
total_read underrun, header underflow, truncated header, valid
message, and exact-boundary acceptance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Improve DB schema: unique WorkoutType name, max lengths, DateTimeOffset

- Add unique index on WorkoutTypes.Name; enforce at service layer with pre-check + DbUpdateException fallback; WorkoutTypesController.Create now catches DomainException -> 409
- Add HasMaxLength constraints: User.Username (50), User.Password (60), WorkoutType.Name (100), WorkoutSession.Notes (1000)
- Change WorkoutSession.LoggedAt from DateTime to DateTimeOffset; propagated to CreateSessionRequest, CreateWorkoutRequest, WorkoutSessionResponse
- Move OrderByDescending(LoggedAt) from SQL to client side (SQLite does not support DateTimeOffset in ORDER BY)
- Add 2 new tests: Create_DuplicateWorkoutTypeName_Returns409, Update_DuplicateWorkoutTypeName_Returns409

All 68 tests pass.

Fix 403 on subdirectories: chmod a+rX /srv and umask 022 before filebrowser

commit.message:
Implement §10.3.1 The net declaration assignment

Net declarations with initializers (e.g., wire w = expr) now create
an implicit continuous assignment in the RTLIR. Drive strengths from
the net declaration are propagated to the continuous assignment.

Add validation that interconnect nets cannot have net declaration
assignments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(tempo): correct single-node config using memberlist + inmemory ring

Uses the pattern from grafana/docker-otel-lgtm (official Grafana reference):
- ingester.lifecycler.ring.kvstore.store: inmemory — registers the ingester
  in an in-process ring, eliminating "empty ring" errors
- memberlist.bind_addr: [127.0.0.1] — loopback gossip, no real cluster needed
- querier.frontend_worker.frontend_address: 127.0.0.1:9095 — self-call so
  the querier fans out searches to the local ingester via the in-memory ring

Also pin all Docker image versions (no more :latest tags):
  grafana/tempo:2.10.1, loki:3.6.7, mimir:2.17.7, pyroscope:1.18.1
  grafana/alloy:v1.13.2, grafana/grafana:12.4.0
  postgres:16.13-alpine, redis:7.4.8-alpine

commit.message:
Add MITRE ATT&CK mapping, STIX export, APK analysis, domain/IP report pages, decoder, simhash clustering, and IOC hardening

New features:
- MITRE ATT&CK technique mapping (attack_mapping.py) with two-source detection:
  AnalysisResult text scan + direct IOC type mapping; false positive fixes by
  excluding extract-ioc section headers from text scan
- STIX 2.1 export for individual samples (GET /files/{id}/stix/) and bulk IOC
  export from IOC page with checkbox selection (POST /iocs/export-stix/)
- APK analysis tool (apk_tool.py) via androguard: manifest, components, intents,
  certificate, strings, URLs, and suspicious indicator sub-tools
- Structured IP/domain report pages (IPCheckPage, DomainCheckPage) with verdict
  banners, per-source cards, and cards-with-missing-keys sorted to bottom
- Decoder page (DecoderPage.tsx + decode_tool.py): base64, hex, URL, rot13, XOR
- Simhash fuzzy similarity (simhash.py + migrations 0036/0040 + backfill command)
- Sample clustering page (ClusterPage.tsx) and correlation page (CorrelationPage.tsx)
- .NET analysis tool (dotnet_tool.py) via dnfile
- IOC enrichment hardening: minimum 3-char registered domain label filter to
  eliminate APK/DEX code artifact false positives (g.is, t.af, ct.io etc.)
- IOC page: checkbox bulk selection, STIX export, paginator matching Vault style
- Sample detail page: ATT&CK section with tactic-coloured badges, STIX export
  button, APK tool category, VT and ATT&CK sections side-by-side
- Migrations 0037-0041: AnalysisResult model, mb_data field, comment improvements,
  attack_mapping field

commit.message:
fix: use plain <script> for JSON-LD instead of next/script

next/script injects tags via JS after hydration — invisible to view-source
and static crawlers. Plain <script type="application/ld+json"> renders in
the initial HTML, making schema detectable by Rich Results Test and
visible in view-source without JS execution.

Affected: LocalBusinessJsonLd (aggregateRating) + BlogPosting schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  can load all Next.js JS/CSS bundles (was blocking full site render)
- Remove fake country-specific sitemaps (bell24h.de/.co.uk/etc. don't exist)
- Remove non-standard Host: and Crawl-delay: directives
- Add Disallow: /dashboard/ /profile/ /settings/ (private pages)
- Update Sitemap URL to https://www.bell24h.com/sitemap.xml (www canonical)

  to match Google Search Console canonical

Complete spec-first FPGA development pipeline execution:
- Phase 0: Protocol SSOT consolidation (deleted duplicate uart_protocol.zig)
- Patent: 3 families documented (P2 ready to file)
- Phase 1: 4 Tier 1 specs validated/created (blink, counter, fsm_simple, uart_top)

- Phase 3: 3/3 designs synthesized to bitstreams
- Documentation: Execution report, benchmarks, toxic verdict, action plan

Spec → VIBEE → Verilog → Yosys → nextpnr → bitstream ✅

Files:
- specs/fpga/*.tri: Tier 1 specs (enhanced + created)
- docs/fpga/*: Execution reports and verdicts
- docs/patents/: Patent architecture map
- fpga/TECH_TREE.md: Technology tree overview
- src/common/protocol.zig: SSOT for protocol (enhanced)
- fpga/openxc7-synth/uart_protocol.zig: DELETED (duplicate)

Known issues documented in TECHNOLOGY_TREE_TOXIC_VERDICT.md:
- VIBEE parser doesn't parse `values` field (manual workaround)
- SSOT import not implemented (constants hardcoded)
- Hardware validation pending (bitstreams ready, needs physical FPGA)

commit.message:
fix: SERP location extractor misses 70%+ of location signals

Two bugs in extractLocationFromSnippet:
1. Pattern 1 ("Location: X") didn't stop at period delimiter, capturing
   "Greater Montreal. View profile on LinkedIn" instead of "Greater Montreal"
2. No pattern for "City, Country" mid-text (e.g., "3 years. Bangalore, India. Built...")

Fixes:
- Pattern 1: add period to delimiter set [^·.\n]
- Pattern 5 (new): iterate "Capital, Capital" segments between sentence
  boundaries, validated through isLikelyLocation. Requires capitalized
  words to avoid false positives like "js, Laravel".

Impact: locationHintCoverage should jump from ~5% to ~40%+ for new
discoveries based on SERP snippet analysis.
